title: Uhambo Lwelifa Lokugqitha Kumaphondo OMzantsi Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

meta.title: Uhambo Lwelifa Lokugqitha Kumaphondo OMzantsi Afrika

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Uhambo Lwelifa Lokugqitha Kumaphondo OMzantsi Afrika
slides.lead: Masihambe kuwo onke amaphondo alithoba size sifumanise iindawo ezikhethekileyo, amabali kunye nezithethe eziyeyethu sonke.

media.alt: Imephu enemibala echaza umda woMzantsi Afrika inamachaphaza aphawula iindawo zelifa kulo lonke ilizwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Wamkela abafundi uze uchaze umbono 'wohambo lwelifa' - uhambo lwasengqondweni olumisa kwiindawo ezikhethekileyo kulo lonke uMzantsi Afrika. Buza: ingaba ukho na othe watyelela imyuziyam, isakhiwo esidala, isikhumbuzo okanye indawo yemveli? Uhambo lwelifa ludibanisa ezi ndawo. Ekupheleni kwesifundo abafundi kufuneka bakwazi ukubiza iindawo zelifa kumaphondo ahlukeneyo baze bathi kutheni sizikhusela.

slides.title: Liyintoni ilifa?
slides.lead: Ilifa yiyo yonke into esiyifumana kwixesha elidlulileyo esifuna ukuyigcinela ikamva.

blocks.text: **Ilifa** zizinto esizifumana kubantu ababephila ngaphambi kwethu. Zingaba zizinto esinokuzibamba, njengezakhiwo ezidala kunye nezixhobo, kunye nezinto esingenako ukuzibamba, njengeengoma, amabali, iilwimi kunye neeresiphi zokupheka. Ilifa lisinceda sazi ukuba singoobani nokuba sivela phi.

items: **Ilifa lemveli** - iintaba, imiqolomba, imilambo kunye nezilwanyana ezikhethekileyo.
**Ilifa lenkcubeko** - izakhiwo, izikhumbuzo, ubugcisa kunye nezinto ezidala.
**Ilifa eliphilayo** - iilwimi, umculo, imidaniso, ukutya kunye nemibhiyozo.

media.alt: Imifanekiso emithathu elula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala kunye negubu, ebonisa iintlobo ezintathu zelifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nika imizekelo ecacileyo yohlobo ngalunye ukuze abafundi beBanga 5 bakwazi ukuzibona ezengqondweni: imveli (iNtaba yeTafile), inkcubeko (iiUnion Buildings), eliphilayo (ukucula isicathamiya, ibraai yosapho, ukubalisa amabali omdabu). Gxininisa ukuba ilifa eliphilayo liphila ebantwini, hayi esakhiweni. Mema abafundi ukuba babize into enye yelifa yosapho lwabo.

slides.title: Iindawo Zelifa Lehlabathi zoMzantsi Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zeendawo zethu zikhetheke kangangokuba ihlabathi lonke linceda ekuzigcineni.

blocks.text: **Indawo Yelifa Lehlabathi** yindawo ekhethwe ngumbutho obizwa ngokuba yi**UNESCO** kuba ibalulekile kubo bonke abantu emhlabeni, hayi kwilizwe elinye kuphela. UMzantsi Afrika unamalungu **alishumi** malunga neendawo ezinjalo, ezisasazeke kumaphondo. Kuhambo lwethu siza kutyelela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethelwe imveli, njengeentaba zaseKapa kunye neeDrakensberg.
Ezinye zikhethelwe imbali, njengeMapungubwe kunye neRobben Island.
Ukuba kuluhlu kuthetha ukuba indawo ikhuselelwe abantwana bexesha elizayo.

media.alt: Ibheji esisangqa enomhlaba ngaphakathi, njengophawu lwelifa lehlabathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina inkcazo ilula: iUNESCO liqela kwiZizwe eziManyeneyo elenza uluhlu olukhethekileyo lweendawo ezibaluleke kakhulu emhlabeni. Akudingeki ukuba abafundi bafunde ngentloko inani elichanekileyo - ingongoma kukuba uMzantsi Afrika utyebile kwiindawo ezinjalo. [SME] Nceda uqinisekise inani langoku leendawo zelifa lehlabathi ze-UNESCO zoMzantsi Afrika (yayilishumi ngo-2023) phambi kokuba isifundo sisebenze.

slides.title: Indawo enye yelifa kwiphondo ngalinye
slides.lead: Amaphondo alithoba, iindawo ezidumileyo ezilithoba zokutyelela kuhambo lwethu.

blocks.heading: IGauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - imiqolomba enezinto ezimbindini zoluntu ezidala kakhulu.

blocks.heading: ILimpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - ubukumkani bokuqala boMzantsi Afrika kunye nomkhombe wegolide.

blocks.heading: INtshona Koloni
blocks.text: Robben Island - intolongo apho uNelson Mandela wayebanjelwe khona.

blocks.heading: IKwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Iintaba zeDrakensberg - imizobo yamawaka yamaSan emaweni.

blocks.heading: IMpuma Koloni
blocks.text: IQunu kunye neMthatha - iindawo zobuntwana bukaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: IMntla Koloni
blocks.text: Ilifa lamaSan kunye nemikroro yamandulo yamatye kwiKaroo eyomileyo.

blocks.heading: IFreyistata
blocks.text: Iilali zamaSotho kunye neVredefort Dome ekufuphi.

blocks.heading: IMntla Ntshona
blocks.text: ITaung, apho ukhakhayi lomntwana wamandulo lwafunyanwa khona.

blocks.heading: IMpumalanga
blocks.text: Iintaba zaseBarberton iMakhonjwa - amanye amatye adala kakhulu emhlabeni.

slides.notes: Le yislayidi yombono ngokubanzi. Funda iphondo ngalinye kunye nendawo yalo ngokuvakalayo, uze ukhombe malunga nalapho ikhoyo kwimephu yasengqondweni (okanye imephu esemdongeni ukuba unayo). Xelela abafundi ukuba iislayidi ezilandelayo ziza kusondeza ezinye zezi. Ungabuza umfundi ngamnye ukuba akhethe indawo afuna ukuyityelela uze uthethe isizathu. [SME] Qinisekisa ukudibanisa iphondo nendawo kufanelekile eklasini yakho; iphondo ngalinye linezindawo zelifa ezininzi kwaye ootitshala bangathanda imizekelo yasekhaya.

slides.title: Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Iqela lemiqolomba ekufuphi neJohannesburg apho ababalisi bezorhawulo bafumana khona ezinye zezinto zosapho loluntu ezidala kakhulu ehlabathini.

blocks.text: Kwi**Sterkfontein Caves** ababalisi bezenzululwazi bemba baze bafumana **iifosili** - amathambo aguqukela ematyeni - abantu bokuqala ababephila kwiminyaka yezigidi eyadlulayo. Ezona zinto zidumileyo zibandakanya ukhakhayi olubizwa ngokuba ngu'Mrs Ples' kunye nesikhumbeni esiphantse saphelela esibizwa ngokuba yi'Little Foot'. Yiloo nto le ndawo ibizwa ngokuba yi*Cradle of Humankind*.

items: Umbombo yindawo apho usana lulala khona - ngoko oku kufana nendawo yokuzalwa koluntu.
Yindawo yeLifa Lehlabathi kuba ibalisa ibali labo bonke abantu.
Usenokuyityelela imiqolomba kunye nemyuziyam nanamhlanje.

media.alt: Umfanekiso ophakathi womqolomba ongaphantsi komhlaba onokhakhayi lwefosili ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza 'ifosili' ngokucacileyo: amathambo aguquka ngokuthe ngcembe abaliwe ngexesha elide kakhulu. ILittle Foot kunye neMrs Ples zenza inzululwazi ibonakale iyinyani kubafundi. Gcina umbono wexesha elide ngokuthozamileyo - 'kudala kudala, ixesha elide kunokuba singaqonda.' Nxibelelanisa neslayidi 5 nekhadi layo. [SME] Iminyaka yenziwe lula ngabom; qinisekisa naliphi na inani atitshala akhetha ukulifunda ngokuvakalayo.

slides.title: Ubukumkani baseMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kudala kudala, phezu kwenduli enencam echanekileyo emantla kude, kwakumi ikomkhulu lobukumkani bokuqala boMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: Malunga neminyaka engama-700 ukuya kuma-800 eyadlulayo, i**Mapungubwe** yayibubukumkani obuxakekileyo apho abantu babelima, begcina iinkomo, berhweba igolide neenqawa neelizwe ezikude. Ukumkani wayehlala phezu kweduli ekhethekileyo. Kamva iingcali zembali bafumana khona izinto ezintle zegolide, kubandakanywa nomkhombe omncinci **wegolide**.

items: Ibonisa ukuba ubukumkani obukhulu base-Afrika babukhona apha ngaphambi kokufika kwabelungu.
Umkhombe wegolide ngoku ungumfuziselo odumileyo wembali yoMzantsi Afrika.
IMapungubwe yindawo yeLifa Lehlabathi emdeni neZimbabwe neBotswana.

media.alt: Induli enencam echanekileyo enomkhombe omncinci wegolide phambi kwayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le slayidi ilungisa intsomi eqhelekileyo ngokubonisa ubukumkani base-Afrika obunamandla nobubutyebi obabuchuma ixesha elide phambi kwexesha lobukoloniyali. Gxininisa urhwebo (igolide neenqawa zihamba kude ngolwandle) kunye nomkhombe wegolide njengobuncwane. Abafundi beBanga 6 bafunda ngeMapungubwe ngokunzulu kamva, ngoko utyala imbewu. Gcina iminyaka iqingqiwe ('malunga neminyaka engama-700 ukuya kuma-800 eyadlulayo').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Isiqithi esincinci elwandle ekufuphi neKapa esaba yintolongo edumileyo - kwaye saba ngumfuziselo wenkululeko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka emininzi i**Robben Island** yayiyintolongo. Ebudeni bobandlululo, iinkokeli ezalwela amalungelo alinganayo zazivalelwa apha, kude nezintsapho zabo. **UNelson Mandela** wachitha iminyaka emininzi kwiseli encinci kwesi siqithi phambi kokuba akhululwe waze kamva waba nguMongameli wokuqala onyulwe ngokwentando yesininzi woMzantsi Afrika.

items: Namhlanje yimyuziyam efundisa abatyeleli ngomzabalazo wenkululeko.
Abanye abakhokeli ngamabanjwa akhe abelana ngamabali abo.
Isikhumbuza ukuba sixabise inkululeko namalungelo esinawo namhlanje.

media.alt: Isiqithi esincinci esinesibane esikhanyisayo elwandle, kunye neNtaba yeTafile kude.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha ubandlululo ngobunono nangokulula kubafundi beBanga 5: abanye abantu babephathwa ngokungalunganga ngenxa yombala wesikhumba sabo, kwaye abantu abanesibindi basebenzela ukuguqula oko. Bonisa i-Robben Island njengendawo yosizi nethemba kunye. Nxibelelanisa noSuku Lwenkululeko / uNelson Mandela ukuba abafundi bayamazi. Phepha iinkcukacha eziqatha; gxila kwisibindi nakuxabiso lwenkululeko.

slides.title: Umzobo Wamatye waseDrakensberg
slides.lead: Phezulu kwiintaba zeDrakensberg kukho amawaka emizobo eyenziwa ngabantu bamaSan kudala.

blocks.text: I**uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** luluhlu lweentaba eziphakame kunazo zonke zoMzantsi Afrika. Imiqolomba yayo neendawo zokhusela zamatye ziqulethe amawaka **emizobo yamatye** eyenziwa ngamaSan **abazingeli-abaqokeleli**. Bazoba abantu, iindluzele, kunye neenkolelo zabo besebenzisa iipeyinti zendalo ezivela ematyeni, kwizityalo nakwizilwanyana.

items: Igama elithi uKhahlamba lithetha 'udonga lwemikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imizobo inamakhulu kwaye kwanamawaka eminyaka ubudala.
Yindawo yeLifa Lehlabathi ngenxa yendalo yayo kunye nobugcisa bamandulo.

media.alt: Udonga lomqolomba olunemizobo yamatye yamaSan yendluzele nomntu obalekayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yazisa amaSan njengabantu bokuqala bomzantsi Afrika kunye neengcali zobugcisa nababalisi bamabali. Chaza indlela ipeyinti eyayenziwa ngayo ngezinto zendalo (i-ochre, ilahle, ubusi bezityalo, amafutha ezilwanyana). Indluzele yayisisilwanyana esibaluleke kakhulu kwiinkolelo zamaSan. Phatha ilifa lamaSan ngentlonelo - le mifanekiso ingcwele kubantu abazizinzalelwane zabo. Nxibelelanisa nemikroro yamatye yaseMntla Koloni kwislayidi elilandelayo.

slides.title: Kwalayo iKaroo neFreyistata
slides.lead: Ezinye izikhululo ezintathu kuhambo lwethu - eMpuma Koloni, eMntla Koloni naseFreyistata.

blocks.heading: IMpuma Koloni - Qunu
blocks.text: Iinduli eziluhlaza apho uNelson Mandela wakhulela khona. Imyuziyam eMthatha ibalisa ibali lobomi bakhe.

blocks.heading: IMntla Koloni - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Induli egqunywe yimikroro yamatye yamandulo, egcinwa ngabantu bamaSan namaKhoe.

blocks.heading: IFreyistata - Ilali yamaSotho
blocks.text: Imyuziyam ephilayo apho unokubona izindlu zamaSotho zesintu ezineendonga ezipeyintiweyo ngobuhle.

media.alt: Imiboniso emithathu emincinci: iinduli ezijikelezayo, ilitye elikroliweyo, kunye nendlu esisangqa epeyintiweyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ezi zikhululo zintathu zolula uhambo kumaphondo amaninzi neentlobo ezininzi zelifa: indawo yokuzalwa komntu (iMpuma Koloni), ubugcisa bamandulo (imikroro yaseMntla Koloni, ekroliweyo ematyeni endaweni yokupeyintwa), kunye nelifa eliphilayo elalini esebenzayo (iFreyistata). Zoba umahluko phakathi kwemizobo yamatye (iKZN) kunye nemikroro yamatye (iMntla Koloni). [SME] Faka iindawo zaseMpuma Koloni okanye iFreyistata zasekhaya ukuba zifanelekile ngcono kubafundi bakho.

slides.title: Amatye amandulo nomntwana wamandulo
slides.lead: Izikhululo zethu zokugqibela ezimbini zamaphondo ziya eMntla Ntshona naseMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: IMntla Ntshona - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ukhakhayi lwefosili lomntwana wamandulo, 'uTaung Child', lwafunyanwa apha. Lwanceda ihlabathi ukufunda ukuba uluntu lwaqala e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: IMpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Iintaba zeMakhonjwa ziqulethe amanye amatye adala kakhulu emhlabeni - malunga neminyaka eyizigidi ezingama-3 500 ubudala - ngoku yindawo yeLifa Lehlabathi.

blocks.heading: Isongezo - iGauteng
blocks.text: IFreedom Park kunye neConstitution Hill emantla zikhumbula umzabalazo wamalungelo oluntu kunye nedemokhrasi.

media.alt: Ukhakhayi oluncinci lwefosili ecaleni kweentaba zamandulo ezingqindilili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung inxibelelana nomxholo weCradle of Humankind - uMzantsi Afrika uphakathi kwibali lemvelaphi yoluntu. IBarberton ibonisa ilifa lemveli lohlobo olwahlukileyo: amatye adala kakhulu ngokungakholelekiyo. Ikhadi lesongezo likuvumela ukuba ukhankanye iindawo zedemokhrasi zaseGauteng (iFreedom Park, iConstitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa unyaka wokufunyanwa koTaung Child (1924) kunye nobudala bamatye obuqingqiweyo (malunga neminyaka eyizigidi ezingama-3 500) ukuba uyazicaphula ngokuvakalayo.

slides.title: Ilifa eliphilayo kunye noSuku Lwelifa
slides.lead: Ayilo lonke ilifa elihlala lithe nzi kwimyuziyam - elinye liphila kwizinto esizenza yonke imihla.

blocks.text: **Ilifa eliphilayo** lidluliselwa ukusuka kubazali abadala ukuya kubazali ukuya kubantwana. Libandakanya **iilwimi zethu ezisemthethweni ezili-11**, iingoma nemidaniso yethu, amabali ethu, izinxibo zethu kunye nokutya kwethu esikuthandayo. Minyaka le ngomhla we-**24 kaSeptemba** uMzantsi Afrika ubhiyozela **uSuku Lwelifa**, xa sihlonipha zonke iinkcubeko zethu ezahlukeneyo.

items: Umculo nomdaniso onjenge-isicathamiya, umdaniso wamagumboots kunye ne-amapiano.
Ukutya okunjenge-pap, ibunny chow, iikoeksisters, umngqusho kunye nechakalaka.
Amabali, izibongo kunye nemidlalo eyabelwana phakathi kwezintsapho.

media.alt: Amanqaku omculo, igubu kunye nepleyiti yokutya emele ilifa eliphilayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza le slayidi ibe yeyona ihileleneyo kakhulu. Cela abafundi ukuba babelane ngengoma, ukutya okanye ibali laselikhaya labo. Gxininisa ukuba ilifa eliphilayo ngelabo bonke kwaye lisoloko litshintsha - i-amapiano lilifa elitsha elenziwa ngoku. Chaza uSuku Lwelifa ngokulula: iholide karhulumente yokubhiyozela zonke iinkcubeko zethu kunye. Qinisekisa intlonelo yeeyahluko.

slides.title: Ukukhathalela ilifa lethu
slides.lead: Ilifa lelethu sonke, ngoko sonke kufuneka sincede ukulikhusela.

blocks.text: Ukuba izakhiwo ezidala ziyawa, imizobo yamatye ikrwitshwa, okanye amabali akaze aphinde abaliswe, elo lifa liphelelwa unaphakade. Yiloo nto sinee**myuziyam**, **izikhumbuzo** kunye nemithetho ekhusela iindawo ezikhethekileyo. Kodwa abantu bemihla ngemihla banceda nabo - ngokutyelela, ngokufunda nangokudlulisela oko bakwaziyo.

items: Ungaze uchukumise okanye wonakalise umzobo wamatye okanye izinto ezidala.
Tyelela iimyuziyam neendawo zelifa ukufunda amabali azo.
Mamela abadala uze udlulisele amabali abo kwabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbini ezibambe ngobunono isakhiwo esincinci kunye nomthi, zibonisa ukukhathalela ilifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Zisa isifundo kwi'ngoko yintoni' - ilifa libuthathaka kwaye linokulahleka. Nxibelelanisa amacebiso amathathu nokuziphatha kwenene kuhambo lwesikolo. Qinisekisa intlonelo yeendawo ezingcwele njengomzobo wamatye wamaSan. Ungabuza abafundi ukuba babize into enye abaza kuyenza ukukhusela ilifa. Oku kulungisa imibuzo yophononongo.

slides.title: Esikufundileyo kuhambo
slides.lead: Sahamba kuwo onke amaphondo alithoba sadibana nelifa lemveli, lenkcubeko nelifa eliphilayo.

blocks.text: Ukususela kwimiqolomba ye**Cradle of Humankind** ukuya kubukumkani base**Mapungubwe**, intolongo ye**Robben Island** kunye neentaba ezipeyintiweyo ze**Drakensberg**, ilifa loMzantsi Afrika libalisa ibali labo bonke abantu balo. Ilifa lelabo bonke, kwaye wonke umntu unokunceda ukulikhusela.

blocks.question: Biza iindawo zelifa ezintathu ezahlukeneyo uze uthi iphi iphondo indawo nganye ekulo.
Chaza umahluko phakathi kwelifa lemveli, ilifa lenkcubeko kunye nelifa eliphilayo. Nika umzekelo omnye ngamnye.
Kutheni kubalulekile ukukhathalela ilifa lethu? Nika izizathu ezibini.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 ujonga ukukhumbula iindawo namaphondo; umbuzo 2 ujonga ingqiqo ephambili yeentlobo ezintathu zelifa; umbuzo 3 ujonga ukuqonda ukuba kutheni ilifa libalulekile. Ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kulandela isimbo seCAPS seSigaba Esiphakathi. Vala ngokukhumbuza abafundi ukuba nabo bayinxalenye yelifa eliphilayo loMzantsi Afrika.
